answer:
no, dont match. matching = worst move w/ 18mo runway

why: they have $50m to burn, u dont. price war on their terms = u run out 1st. their 40% cut is prob unsustainable anyway — vc-funded land grab, prices creep back up in 12-24mo if they dont die

what to do instead:
1. hold price, sell value — talk to ur top 20 custs this wk, find out why they picked u. double down on that in every deal
2. segment defense — only discount case-by-case for at-risk accts, & trade for smth (2-3yr contract, case study, prepay). never blanket cut
3. watch churn weekly. if gross churn jumps >2-3x baseline in next 2 qtrs, thats ur signal to rethink, not b4
4. lock in renewals early — offer multi-yr @ current price now b4 custs start comparing
5. add cheaper tier if u must compete downmarket, but keep flagship price intact. protects ARR + gives sales an answer

math check: 40% cut on $3m ARR = ~$1.8m ARR overnight, runway drops fast + u signal ur product wasnt worth it. only ~worth it if ur churn explodes & CAC is way lower @ new price — unlikely

also: their raise = validation of ur mkt. use it in ur own fundraise narrative, start raising ~mo 9-12, dont wait til mo 15

flag: if ur product is truly undifferentiated commodity, diff story — then u need differentiation or niche focus asap, bc u lose any pure price war either way
